candidate_definitions.text: A Java implementation of the language server protocol intended to be consumed by tools and language servers implemented in Java.
Java binding for the [Language Server Protocol](https://microsoft.github.io/language-server-protocol) and the [Debug Adapter Protocol](https://microsoft.github.io/debug-adapter-protocol).
Simple and productive Web Development Tools in the Eclipse IDE
EditorConfig for Eclipse based on GenericEditor and tm4e
Dart and Flutter development support for the Eclipse IDE
Eclipse based IDE for the Dart programming language and the Flutter application framework

The next generation of tooling for Spring Boot, including support for Cloud Foundry manifest files, Concourse CI pipeline definitions, BOSH deployment manifests, and more... - Available for Visual Studio Code, Cursor, Eclipse, and Theia
The all-new Spring Tools for Visual Studio Code, Eclipse, and Theia. Learn more at https://spring.io/tools.

A fork of the Eclipse project used to generate distributable binaries, extended to include the Eclipse Embedded CDT plug-ins. The archive of previous packages is also here, as Releases.
Bnd/Bndtools.  Tooling to build OSGi bundles including Eclipse, Maven, and Gradle plugins.
